scripts.build:deb: pnpm preflight:deb:ci && pnpm tauri build -- --bundles deb
scripts.wire:all: bun run wire:apps && bun run wire:websites
scripts.qc:all: bun run qc -- ecosystem --root ./apps && bun run qc -- ecosystem --root ./websites
scripts.qc:all:deep: bun run qc -- ecosystem --root ./apps --deep && bun run qc -- ecosystem --root ./websites --deep
